sections.body: Below is a summary of liens and other encumbrances identified as affecting the property at 15201 SW 88th Ave, Palmetto Bay, FL 33157. All information is directly supported by the cited title search evidence. Satisfied mortgages are included for completeness but are noted as released.

blocks.notes: Property taxes and assessments for the year 2025 and subsequent years are a lien on the property, though they are not yet due and payable.
blocks.title: 2025 Property Tax Lien

citations.claim: 2025 property tax lien in the amount of $8,247.00 is active but not yet due or payable.

sections.heading: Liens and Encumbrances on the Property

sections.body: A summary of the property tax payment status for 15201 SW 88th Ave, including amounts paid and outstanding for the 2024 and 2025 tax years, as well as associated parcel details.

blocks.notes: 2025 property taxes are a lien but are not yet due and payable as of the report date.
blocks.title: 2025 Property Tax

citations.claim: 2025 property taxes are unpaid, amounting to $8,247.00, due November 1, 2025. Parcel number: 33-5022-014-0290. Taxes are a lien but not yet due and payable.

sections.body: The following summarizes the recorded chain of ownership and the current vesting status for the property located at 15201 SW 88th Ave, Palmetto Bay, FL 33157.

citations.claim: Maria Santos acquired fee simple ownership recorded January 1, 2003.

spans.raw_text:
NOTE: The chain of title shows the following sequence of ownership:
- Maria Santos (fee simple, recorded 2003)

citations.claim: Maria Santos conveyed the property to Carlos A. Rodriguez by warranty deed recorded January 1, 2015.

spans.raw_text: [L29] - Santos to Rodriguez, Carlos A. (warranty deed, recorded 2015)
- Santos to Rodriguez, Carlos A. (warranty deed, recorded 2015)
